mapper.select: WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_ACTI' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_ACTI' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.PROCS_ID = #{procsId} ), LATEST_VAL AS ( SELECT TAGSN, VAL FROM ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY R.TAGSN ORDER BY R.LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) SELECT T.PROCS_ID, ROUND(NVL(SUM(L.VAL), 0), 2) AS REAL_TIME_POWER FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN LATEST_VAL L ON T.TAGSN = L.TAGSN GROUP BY T.PROCS_ID

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_ACTI' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_ACTI' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.PROCS_ID = #{procsId} ), MINUTE_SUM AS ( SELECT R.LOG_TIME, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 9, 2) AS HH, SUM(R.VAL) AS TOTAL_POWER FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' GROUP BY R.LOG_TIME ), MAX_POWER AS ( SELECT HH AS MAX_HOUR, TOTAL_POWER AS MAX_POWER, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TOTAL_POWER DESC) AS RN FROM MINUTE_SUM ) SELECT #{procsId} AS PROCS_ID, MAX_HOUR, ROUND(MAX_POWER, 2) AS MAX_POWER FROM MAX_POWER WHERE RN = 1

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.PROCS_ID = #{procsId} ), CURRENT_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS CURRENT_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') ), ZERO_HOUR_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS ZERO_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ) SELECT #{procsId} AS PROCS_ID, ROUND(SUM(NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) - NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0)), 2) AS POWER_USAGE_MWH FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN CURRENT_VAL C ON T.TAGSN = C.TAGSN LEFT JOIN ZERO_HOUR_VAL Z ON T.TAGSN = Z.TAGSN

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.PROCS_ID = #{procsId} ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT #{procsId} AS PROCS_ID, #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(R.VAL) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDR01MI_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00' GROUP BY HR.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT PROCS_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - NVL(LAG(HOUR_VAL, 1) OVER (ORDER BY HOUR_KEY), 0) AS HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_DATA ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), /* 기본요금 */ BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN DATA_SE_CD = 7 THEN APLCN_UNTPRC END), 0) / 6 AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date},1,4) AND APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.PROCS_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE,0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC,0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date},1,4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 3 ),
FLAD_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.PROCS_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE,0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC,0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date},1,4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.PROCS_ID, H.HH, CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * 1000 * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC,100) ELSE 0 END AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.HH = U.HH ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.PROCS_ID, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE,0) + NVL(B.PRICE,0) + NVL(C.PRICE,0) + NVL(D.PRICE,0) + NVL(E.PRICE,0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A CROSS JOIN BASIC_PRICE B CROSS JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.PROCS_ID = D.PROCS_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.PROCS_ID = E.PROCS_ID ),
TAX_PRICE AS ( SELECT PROCS_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ),
ELFD_PRICE AS ( SELECT PROCS_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE )
SELECT #{procsId} AS PROCS_ID, ROUND( SUM( NVL(E.PRICE,0) + NVL(T.PRICE,0) + NVL(F.PRICE,0) ) ,0) AS POWER_COST, TO_CHAR( SUM( NVL(E.PRICE,0) + NVL(T.PRICE,0) + NVL(F.PRICE,0) ), 'FM999,999,999,990.0000' ) AS REAL_COST FROM ELTL_PRICE E LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.HH = T.HH AND E.PROCS_ID = T.PROCS_ID LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.HH = F.HH AND E.PROCS_ID = F.PROCS_ID;

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), PROCS_TAGS_ACTI AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_ACTI' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_ACTI' FROM DUAL ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA_DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), -#{range}) + 1 ), PROCS_LIST AS ( SELECT DISTINCT PROCS_ID FROM PROCS_TAGS ), TAG_LIST_AE AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), TAG_LIST_ACTI AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN FROM PROCS_TAGS_ACTI P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ),
DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DATA_DT, T.PROCS_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN RN_LAST = 1 THEN R.VAL ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN RN_FIRST = 1 THEN R.VAL ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_VALUE FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, TAGSN, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN_LAST, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) ORDER BY LOG_TIME ASC) AS RN_FIRST FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST_AE) ) R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST_AE T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.RN_LAST = 1 OR R.RN_FIRST = 1 GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8), T.PROCS_ID )
DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DATA_DT, T.PROCS_ID, MAX(MINUTE_SUM) AS LAST_VALUE FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, TAGSN, VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST_ACTI) ) R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST_ACTI T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN INNER JOIN ( SELECT LOG_TIME, SUM(VAL) AS MINUTE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST_ACTI) GROUP BY LOG_TIME ) MS ON R.LOG_TIME = MS.LOG_TIME GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8), T.PROCS_ID )
SELECT D.DATA_DT, P.PROCS_ID, ROUND(NVL(DD.LAST_VALUE, 0), 2) AS LAST_VALUE FROM DATE_RANGE D CROSS JOIN PROCS_LIST P LEFT JOIN DAILY_DATA DD ON D.DATA_DT = DD.DATA_DT AND P.PROCS_ID = DD.PROCS_ID ORDER BY D.DATA_DT, P.PROCS_ID

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT P.PROCS_ID, T.TAGSN FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), UP_TBL AS ( SELECT S.*, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE SUBSTR(#{from}, 1, 4) <= CRTR_YR AND CRTR_YR <= SUBSTR(#{to}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD ), HOURLY_RAW AS ( SELECT T.PROCS_ID, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 10) AS HOUR_KEY, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DATA_DT, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YYYY, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 5, 2) AS MM, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 7, 2) AS DD, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 9, 2) AS HH, R.TAGSN, R.VAL FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, TAGSN, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 10) ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND LOG_TIME >= #{from} || '0000' AND LOG_TIME <= #{to} || '2359' ) R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.RN = 1 ), HOURLY_SUM AS ( SELECT PROCS_ID, DATA_DT, YYYY, MM, DD, HH, HOUR_KEY, SUM(VAL) AS HOUR_VAL FROM HOURLY_RAW GROUP BY PROCS_ID, DATA_DT, YYYY, MM, DD, HH, HOUR_KEY ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT PROCS_ID, DATA_DT, YYYY, MM, DD, HH, HOUR_VAL, HOUR_VAL - LAG(HOUR_VAL, 1, HOUR_VAL) OVER (PARTITION BY PROCS_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY) AS HOUR_USAGE, CASE WHEN MM IN ('11', '12', '01', '02') THEN 'W' WHEN MM IN ('06', '07', '08') THEN 'S' ELSE 'F' END AS APLCN_PTM_CD FROM HOURLY_SUM ) SELECT SUBSTR(H.DATA_DT, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(H.DATA_DT, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(H.DATA_DT, 7, 2) AS DATA_DT, H.PROCS_ID, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE ELSE 0 END), 2) AS USG, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * 1000 * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PRC FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UP_TBL U ON H.YYYY = U.CRTR_YR AND H.APLCN_PTM_CD = U.APLCN_PTM_CD AND H.HH = U.HH GROUP BY H.DATA_DT, H.PROCS_ID ORDER BY H.DATA_DT, H.PROCS_ID

WITH PROCS_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS PROCS_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT T.TAGSN FROM PROCS_TAGS P INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON P.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.PROCS_ID = #{procsId} ), BASE_VAL AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT LOG_TIME AS HOUR_KEY, SUM(VAL) AS HOUR_SUM FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND LOG_TIME > #{date} || '00' AND LOG_TIME <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') GROUP BY LOG_TIME ) SELECT H.HOUR_KEY, H.HOUR_SUM, B.BASE_SUM, CASE WHEN (H.HOUR_SUM - B.BASE_SUM) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (H.HOUR_SUM - B.BASE_SUM) END AS USAGE_KWH, ROUND(CASE WHEN (H.HOUR_SUM - B.BASE_SUM) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (H.HOUR_SUM - B.BASE_SUM) END, 4) AS USAGE_MWH FROM HOURLY_DATA H CROSS JOIN BASE_VAL B ORDER BY H.HOUR_KEY
